name: Raisin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Finely chopped pitted dates may be substituted to get Date Muffins. If using sweetened cereal, omit sugar.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
Grease 12 muffin cups with cooking spray or butter.
Mix cereal and milk in a bowl until mostly combined.
In a separate medium-sized bowl, sift flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
Add raisins and walnuts; stir to combine.
Add egg and oil to the cereal mixture and beat well with a fork until smooth.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix only until just moistened.
Fill each prepared muffin cup about 2/3 full with batter.
Bake for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from pan and serve immediately.
